title: bigelovia cassinoides
intro: Bigelovia cassinoides, also known as the Mountain Laurel or Kalmia polifolia, is a flowering shrub that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bigelovia cassinoides are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain infections. Bigelovia cassinoides is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, teas, or tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
